title: Chain 1/8: Borrow Something
scene: 你做蛋糕缺鸡蛋，去敲邻居门。（对话链：邻里）

turns.cn: 不好意思，能借三个鸡蛋吗？明天还。
turns.en: Sorry to bother you. Could I borrow three eggs? I'll replace them tomorrow.
Of course. One moment.
Thanks so much. I need them for a cake.
No problem. That's what neighbors are for.
I'll bring you a slice when it's done.
I'd love that!

title: Chain 2/8: Hold a Package
scene: 你帮邻居代收快递。（对话链：邻里）

turns.cn: 明天有快递能帮我收一下吗？我不在家。
turns.en: Could you grab a package for me tomorrow? I won't be home.
Sure. They can leave it at my door.

turns.cn: 到了我发短信，晚上来取。
turns.en: I'll text when it arrives. I'll pick it up tonight.
Okay. Not too late—I sleep around ten.
Before nine. Thanks!

title: Chain 3/8: Noise Issue
scene: 邻居装修太吵，你礼貌去沟通。（对话链：邻里）

turns.cn: 不好意思，装修能十点后再钻吗？孩子在睡。
turns.en: Sorry, could drilling wait until after ten? My kid's sleeping.

turns.cn: 抱歉不知道，我让工人下午再弄。
turns.en: Sorry, I didn't realize. I'll have them do it this afternoon.
Thanks for understanding. How long will the work take?
Should finish this week. We'll keep it as quiet as we can.
Okay. Let me know if anything comes up.

title: Chain 4/8: Water Leak
scene: 楼上漏水到你家，你紧急联系邻居。（对话链：邻里）

turns.cn: 您好，我家天花板在滴水，能上楼看看吗？
turns.en: Hi, water's dripping through my ceiling. Can we check upstairs?
Oh no. I'll shut off the main valve right now!
I've called building management too.

turns.cn: 是洗衣机接口松了，对不起。
turns.en: The washer hookup was loose. I'm so sorry.

turns.cn: 人没事就好，一起等物业。
turns.en: As long as everyone's okay. Let's wait for management together.

title: Chain 5/8: Share Tools
scene: 邻居向你借电钻。（对话链：邻里）

turns.cn: 能借电钻挂幅画吗？半小时就还。
turns.en: Could I borrow your drill to hang a picture? Half an hour tops.

turns.cn: 在储物间，钻头在盒子里。
turns.en: It's in the storage room. Bits are in the case.

turns.cn: 需要几个膨胀螺丝，你有吗？
turns.en: I need wall anchors. Do you have any?
Yes. I'll grab a few for you.

turns.cn: 太感谢，挂完请你喝咖啡。
turns.en: Thanks a lot. Coffee's on me when I'm done.

title: Chain 6/8: Pet Sitting
scene: 你出差，请邻居帮忙喂猫。（对话链：邻里）

turns.cn: 周五到周日能帮忙喂猫吗？钥匙给你。
turns.en: Could you feed my cat Friday through Sunday? I'll give you a key.
No problem. Twice a day?

turns.cn: 对，粮在水碗旁，猫砂在阳台。
turns.en: Yes. Food's by the water bowl. Litter box is on the balcony.
Is the cat shy?
A bit. Just leave food, no need to hold her.
Okay. I'll send you photos each day.

title: Chain 7/8: Block Party
scene: 邻居邀请你参加楼下街区烧烤。（对话链：邻里）

turns.cn: 周六楼下街区烧烤，来吗？
turns.en: Block barbecue Saturday downstairs. Coming?
Sure. What should I bring?

turns.cn: 饮料或沙拉都行，肉我们准备。
turns.en: Drinks or a salad. We're providing the meat.
I'll bring salad and juice.

turns.cn: 下午四点开始，欢迎带孩子。
turns.en: Starts at four PM. Kids are welcome.
We'll be there.

title: Chain 8/8: Thank the Neighbor
scene: 出差回来，你带礼物感谢邻居。（对话链：邻里）

turns.cn: 谢谢帮忙照顾猫，这是旅行带的小礼物。
turns.en: Thanks for watching the cat. Brought you a little gift from my trip.

turns.cn: 太客气了！猫很乖，天天蹲门口等我。
turns.en: That's so kind! She was great—waited by the door every day.
I saw all the photos. Really appreciate it.
Anytime. We're neighbors.
Same. Call me anytime you need something.
